summary: 0.6.28 is the bounded CUA input and focus slice on top of the good 0.6.27 core-player baseline, aimed at keeping VR gaze capture from trapping navigation while preserving the already-good trigger-plus-joystick transport behavior.
operatorSignals: 0.6.27 is a good baseline and already hides controller pointers while the user looks at the screen.
The operator wants thumbstick-click grab navigation to always override disabled navigation while the button is held.
Gaze focus should only re-engage on release or stop if the user is still looking at a screen.
If the trigger is pressed without joystick navigation, releasing it should toggle play or pause.
A stateful visible-screen seam is needed for future indicators, but no indicator UI should be implemented yet.
actionsTaken: Kept the slice strictly inside the CUA input and focus seam instead of reopening playback, sync, playlists, or surfaces.
Added a thumbstick-click grab-navigation override that releases CUA capture while the override is active.
Changed gaze focus reacquisition so it waits for locomotion to stop before it can re-engage.
Added a trigger-tap release action that toggles play or pause only when joystick navigation was not used during the trigger hold.
Exposed a transient active-screen string field for future screen indicators without adding new UI.
nonGoals: No surface, binding, TV, or Volodeck work.
No playlist or autoplay policy changes.
